name: Chemical Volcano
recipeInstructions:
1. Build a mound of dirt around the bottle, keeping the top of the bottle open.
2. Combine the liquid detergent and food coloring in the bottle.
3. Add 1 cup vinegar to the bottle.
4. Pour warm water almost to the top of the bottle.
5. In a spoon, blend the baking soda with a little tap water to moisten it.
6. Quickly pour the baking soda mixture into the bottle.
Your children will want to try this several times in a row.
